task_description: Add branding overlay support, local media library with upload/labeling/search, and local-first media sourcing that checks the user's library before hitting external stock APIs.
findings: All 5 review issues fixed: (1) library file deletion prevention, (2) metadata lock, (3) upload size limits, (4) content-type validation, (5) slider API call debouncing. All 143 backend tests and 13 frontend tests pass. Build succeeds.
